path: PNGS/Aqa Muhammad ﷺ/Ali is like Haroon.png
text: Allah's Apostle set out for Tabuk. appointing VANl as his deputy (in Medina). VAl said, *Do you want to leave me with the children and women?* The Prophet said, *Will you not be pleased that you will be to me like Aaron to Moses? But there ‘will be o prophet after me.* Reference : Sahih al-Bukhari 4416
